title: PigFriend+
description: Play Minecraft with a customizable, immortal warrior pet pig! ✨
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04206821a9534c5dd0e091b24d0360378266c1b4.png)

## 📚 | ABOUT
• PigFriend+ is a mod that adds a pet pig for every player in a Singleplayer or Multiplayer world. You can customize the appearance of your pig by changing its skin color, collar color, and saddle color. You can ride it by placing a saddle, and it doesn't need a carrot on a stick to move. Your pig will defend and help you fight when you are attacked by a mob or when you attack one. You can increase its attack damage by feeding it carrots. It will always follow you and will fly when you use an Elytra. On top of all that, your pig is immortal, and you can make it crouch to stop following you. 🐷✨
